notes: GitHub PAT has metadata+contents write but NOT issues:write — commits with 'closes #N' trailers auto-close issues on merge/push, but API comments + state transitions via PATCH are blocked (403 'Resource not accessible by personal access token'). Commenting/closing needs a PAT with issues:write or must be done manually by the human. Commit message 'closes #25, #26, #27' handles auto-close on push to main.

issues.action_taken: none — API cannot comment/close; human should close manually referencing #25
